modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues registering various gaming systems and smart devices to the network

full_description_text:  
I'm having a really hard time getting my Xbox, PlayStation, and even my Roku to register on the network. Every time I try, I get this annoying error about verifying the MAC address. It's super frustrating because I can't watch any movies or play games, and I just want to connect my Amazon Firestick and Oculus too. Is there any way to fix this?
short_description: Issues registering various gaming systems and smart devices to the network
